cn_title: 《007 初露锋芒》首日销量150万份，超越IO Interactive旗下所有《杀手》游戏
opus_summary: IO Interactive开发的《007 初露锋芒》首日销量达150万份，创下工作室历史最快销售纪录，超越《杀手》系列所有作品。游戏在Metacritic获得87分，IGN打出9/10。仅Steam平台首日就贡献约50万份和2500万美元收入。

paragraphs.en: 007 First Light has got off to a strong start, selling 1.5 million copies in its first 24 hours. It's the fastest-selling game in developer IO Interactive's history, which means it sold faster in its first 24 hours than any Hitman game.
paragraphs.cn: 《007 初露锋芒》开局强劲，首日24小时内售出150万份。这是开发商IO Interactive历史上卖得最快的游戏，意味着它的首日销售速度超过了所有《杀手》系列作品。

paragraphs.en: The impressive sales milestone was achieved without the aid of the Nintendo Switch 2 version, which is due out this summer.
paragraphs.cn: 这一惊人的销售里程碑是在Nintendo Switch 2版本尚未推出的情况下达成的——后者预计今年夏季发售。

paragraphs.en: The James Bond adventure is also the highest rated IOI game ever, with an 87 on Metacritic. IGN's 007 First Light review returned a 9/10. We said: "Demonstrably obsessed with bringing the Bond fantasy to life in a way no one has ever managed before, 007 First Light is the best Bond game I've ever played."
paragraphs.cn: 这款詹姆斯·邦德冒险游戏同时也是IOI有史以来评分最高的作品，Metacritic上获得87分。IGN的评测给出了9/10分，我们写道：「它痴迷于以前所未有的方式将邦德幻想变为现实，《007 初露锋芒》是我玩过的最好的邦德游戏。」

paragraphs.en: "The milestone of 1.5 million units sold in 24 hours reflects overwhelming global enthusiasm for 007 First Light and represents a significant achievement for IO Interactive," the developer said.
paragraphs.cn: 「24小时售出150万份的里程碑反映了全球玩家对《007 初露锋芒》的巨大热情，也代表着IO Interactive的重大成就，」开发商表示。

paragraphs.en: Rhys Elliott, head of market analysis at Alinea Analytics, said 007 First Light had sold an estimated 500,000 copies on Steam alone, generating around $25 million in revenue on Valve's platform.
paragraphs.cn: Alinea Analytics市场分析主管Rhys Elliott表示，《007 初露锋芒》仅在Steam平台就售出约50万份，在Valve平台创造了约2500万美元收入。

paragraphs.en: "The Steam performance really stood out for this one," Elliott said. "It's the latest example of a traditionally 'console' game doing fantastic numbers on Steam." About a third of 007 First Light players on Steam have also played Hitman, Elliott added.
paragraphs.cn: 「这款游戏的Steam表现确实非常亮眼，」Elliott说，「它是传统'主机游戏'在Steam上取得惊人成绩的最新案例。」Elliott补充说，Steam上约三分之一的《007 初露锋芒》玩家也玩过《杀手》系列。

paragraphs.en: "For Amazon, which owns the Bond rights and licensed IOI to make this game, the early signs are bloody good," he continued. "The franchise hasn't had a quality adaptation in decades, and IOI has now delivered one that looks like a serious commercial proposition."
paragraphs.cn: 「对于拥有邦德版权并授权IOI制作这款游戏的亚马逊来说，早期信号非常乐观，」他继续说道，「这个系列几十年来都没有过高质量的游戏改编，而IOI现在交出了一款看起来具有强大商业前景的作品。」

paragraphs.en: So, the first 24 hours are strong for 007, but it will be interesting to see how sales develop over the coming weeks and months. To put its performance into context, Crimson Desert sold 2 million in its first 24 hours back in March, and went on to sell 5 million in less than a month.
paragraphs.cn: 总之，007的首日成绩强劲，但未来几周几个月的销售走势同样值得关注。作为参考，《红色沙漠》3月首日就售出200万份，不到一个月突破500万。

paragraphs.en: Clearly, IOI hopes for enough success to continue 007 First Light's story with a sequel. Indeed, the developer has said it wants to make a trilogy of James Bond games.
paragraphs.cn: 显然，IOI希望足够的成功能让他们以续作延续《007 初露锋芒》的故事。事实上，开发商已经表示他们想制作詹姆斯·邦德游戏三部曲。
